```
          +---------------+
          |  Plant UML  |
          |  (Class)       |
          |  (Create_class)     |
          |  (Define_class_with_label    |
          |  (Label_on_node        |
```

Here is the code in Python:
```
def plantUml(node):
    def create_class():
        label = f"<{node}>"
        label += f"{label}"
        return label

    def define_class_with_label(label):
        node['value'] = label
        return label
    
    def define_class():
        label = f"[{{label}}]"
        label += f"[{{label}]"]
        return label
        
    def create_class_with_label(label):
        node['value'] = label
        return label

    def define_class():
        label = f"[{{label}}]"
        label += f"[{{label}]]"]
        return label
    
    def definition_class():
        label = f"{node['label']}    # {create_class()}"
        return label
        
    def create_class(class):
        return createUml(class)
    def define_class(class):
        return definitionUml(class)
```
